_label_note: VN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow precision fixes covered Vietnam MST/VAT/TIN and public-hotline numeric bait, grouped CCCD recognition, Vietnamese placeholder CCCD context, negated MAC/MAE prose, and wellness spa bait.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: subject to insider-trading controls under the Securities Law and HOSE Listing Rules
IR team must not distribute the draft until after the embargo

Definitive agreements: Share Subscription Agreement (SSA) and Strategic Cooperation Agreement in near-final form (draft 2026-06-20) circulated for board review; closing conditioned on UBCKNN approval and HOSE notification.

IR considerations: draft Q3 guidance references uplift from Nam Cát Solar 2; IR team must not distribute the draft until after the embargo, and all media responses should use the standard “no comment” language.

Conditions precedent: UBCKNN approval, HOSE acknowledgement, corporate approvals (board and shareholders’ circular resolution per LOE Art. 156), anti-money laundering clearance on Aster Banyan funds, and no MAE between signing and closing.

Covenants: dividend lock-up through FY2027 and a 12-month standstill by Aster Banyan on secondary market purchases above 19.9%; any waiver requires a supermajority board vote including at least one independent director.
